en_title: The Steam Machine Costs $1049, Is That Too Much?
cn_title: Steam Machine售价1049美元(约合人民币7112元)，贵不贵？
subtitle: 小身材，大价钱
opus_summary: Steam Machine推出，512GB版起售价1049美元(约合人民币7112元)(约7112元)，2TB版1349美元(约合人民币9146元)(约合人民币。

paragraphs.en: After months of speculation, the Steam Machine is finally here, starting at $1049 for the 512GB version. If that price is still within your budget, you can reserve it now on Steam.
paragraphs.cn: 经过数月的猜测，Steam Machine终于来了，512GB版本起价1049美元(约合人民币7112元)。如果这个价格仍在你的预算范围内，你现在就可以在Steam上预订。

paragraphs.en: That $1049 is just the starting price, getting you just the 512GB version of the mini gaming PC without the Steam Controller. If you do want to add the Steam Controller, there is a bundle for $1128, which means you're getting Valve's controller for $79, rather than the $99 it'll cost you by itself.
paragraphs.cn: 1049美元(约合人民币7112元)只是起售价，你只能获得这台迷你游戏PC的512GB版本，不包含Steam Controller。如果你想加购Steam Controller，还有一个1128美元(约合人民币7648元)的捆绑包，相当于你用79美元(约合人民币536元)买到了Valve的手柄，而不是单独购买所需的99美元(约合人民币671元)。

paragraphs.en: If 512GB of storage isn't enough for you, Valve is also selling a 2TB model, which will set you back $1349 for just the Steam Machine, or $1428 bundled with the Steam Controller. That's a steep price, to be sure, but Valve is packing two additional faceplates with every 2TB console, so you at least get some added customization options.
paragraphs.cn: 如果512GB存储空间对你来说不够用，Valve还提供了一款2TB型号，单买Steam Machine就要1349美元(约合人民币9146元)，或者1428美元(约合人民币9682元)的捆绑包（含Steam Controller）。这个价格确实不菲，但Valve为每台2TB主机额外附赠了两块面板，所以你至少获得了一些额外的个性化定制选项。

paragraphs.en: Way back when Valve first revealed the Steam Deck, my gut was telling me that it'd cost somewhere around $700-$800 . I was probably right at the time , but the costs for PC components, particularly RAM have skyrocketed over the last six months or so. That $1049 is going to be a hard pill to swallow for anyone hoping to get the Steam Machine, especially if you were weighing it against the PS5 or Xbox Series X, both of which are more affordable – at least for now.
paragraphs.cn: 早在Valve首次公布Steam Deck的时候，我的直觉告诉我它的售价大概在700至800美元(约合人民币4746至5424元)之间。当时我可能猜对了，但在过去大约六个月里，PC组件（尤其是内存）的成本已经飙升了不少。对于任何希望入手Steam Machine的人来说，1049美元(约合人民币7112元)的价格都难以接受，尤其是当你把它和PS5或XBOX Series比较时——两者都更实惠，至少目前是这样。

paragraphs.en: But while the Steam Machine is quite a bit more expensive than any of the mainstream gaming consoles, it is still a gaming PC . And, in that world, the Steam Machine's $1049 price tag isn't quite as painful, especially when you consider how tiny it is. After all, mini gaming PCs with this kind of horsepower can cost hundreds more than the Steam Machine currently does.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，虽然Steam Machine比任何主流游戏主机都要贵不少，但它毕竟是一台游戏PC。在这个领域里，Steam Machine 1049美元(约合人民币7112元)的价格标签就没那么令人痛苦了，尤其是考虑到它的体积有多小。毕竟，拥有同等性能的迷你游戏PC目前要比Steam Machine贵上数百美元。

paragraphs.en: If the Steam Machine's high price doesn't scare you away, you can reserve it now on Steam. Valve seems to have learned its lessons from both the Steam Controller and the Steam Deck's launch, so the Steam Machine will only be available via a randomized reservation queue.
paragraphs.cn: 如果Steam Machine的高价没有把你吓退，你现在就可以在Steam上预订。Valve似乎从Steam Controller和Steam Deck的首发中吸取了教训，所以Steam Machine将仅通过随机排队预约的方式购买。

paragraphs.en: Valve hopes that this system will not only combat bots and scalpers, but will stop people from feeling like they have to sit at the store page and mash the refresh button to get to the front of the line.
paragraphs.cn: Valve希望这个系统不仅能打击机器人和黄牛，还能阻止人们觉得自己必须守在商店页面狂按刷新按钮才能排到前面。

paragraphs.en: Anyone that doesn't make it into the initial waitlist by June 25 will be added to the back of the waitlist. I did get a chance to sit down with Valve ahead of launch , and I asked how easy it'd be for folks to get their hands on a Steam Machine. Valve told me that even more than pricing, the RAM shortage affected availability, so who knows how many Steam Machines will actually be available at launch. But, at least it sounds like Valve will be actively trying to combat bots and scalpers.
paragraphs.cn: 任何未能在6月25日前进入初始等候名单的人，都将被添加到列表末尾。我在发售前确实有机会与Valve坐下来聊了聊，询问人们能多容易拿到一台Steam Machine。Valve告诉我，比定价影响更大的是，内存短缺影响了供货情况，所以谁知道发售时实际会有多少台Steam Machine。但至少听起来Valve会积极尝试打击机器人和黄牛。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas是IGN硬件与购买指南编辑，也是PC组件女王。你可以在Twitter上关注她 @Jackiecobra。
